meaning: n.亚利桑那州(美国西南部的州)
examples: I've lived most of my adult life in Arizona.
The single-engine plane landed in western Arizona.
Seventeen thousand Indians live in Arizona on a reservation.
Today privately held Niagara has 1, 000 customers in California, Nevada and Arizona and employs 245 people.
"Get your kitsch on Route 66" might be a better slogan for Arizona's scrubby stretch of Mother Road.
